nasb.text: But a voice from heaven answered a second time, ‘What God has cleansed, no longer consider unholy.’

esv.text: But the voice answered a second time from heaven, ‘What God has made clean, do not call common.’

cnv.text: 第二次又有聲音從天上回答：‘　神所潔淨的，你不可當作俗物。’

ccb.text: 那从天上来的声音又说，‘上帝已经洁净的，你不可再称之为不洁净。’

csbs.text: 那声音第二次从天上传来，说：‘神所洁净的，你不可当做污秽的。’
